text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan jokes that the Ocean Stakes is a
warm-up for her Cutie ♪ Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can say anything, She assures me that her
motivation for the race is as high as ever, and
she's eager to run.
